en.home_hero_desc: End-to-end software house based in Indonesia. We design, develop, and scale custom web and mobile applications for modern businesses.

en.home_services_info_0: Experienced developer teams ready to join your projects flexibly.
en.home_services_web_desc: Custom applications built with modern frameworks for optimal performance and scale.
en.home_services_outsource_desc: Dedicated engineering teams to accelerate your product development lifecycle.

en.home_services_cloud_desc: Scalable infrastructure and automated CI/CD pipelines for robust deployment.
en.home_services_uiux_desc: User-centric design systems and interfaces that drive engagement and conversion.
en.home_services_qa_desc: Comprehensive automated and manual testing to ensure flawless delivery.

en.home_preview_outsource_desc: Curated tech talents ready to integrate and accelerate your internal team's productivity instantly.
en.home_preview_vibe_desc: Rapid AI-powered prototyping utilizing cutting-edge LLMs to bring ideas to life at lightspeed.
en.home_preview_cloud_desc: CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, and reliable cloud infrastructure on AWS & GCP.
en.home_preview_uiux_desc: Beautiful, intuitive interfaces crafted through user research, wireframing, and pixel-perfect design.
en.home_preview_qa_desc: Comprehensive automated and manual testing to ensure your product is bug-free and production-ready.
en.home_testimonials_desc: Hear what our partners have to say about our collaborations.
en.home_testimonials_quote_1: "HimawariDigi completely transformed how we operate. Their attention to detail and proactive approach to problem-solving delivered an app that exceeded all our expectations."
en.home_testimonials_quote_2: "The Vibe Coding service is insane. They prototyped our idea in a weekend, and the final production build was flawless. Absolutely top-tier software house."
en.home_testimonials_quote_3: "We outsourced our QA to HimawariDigi and the result was an immediate drop in production bugs. They integrated seamlessly with our internal team."
en.home_featured_desc: A real-time financial tracking dashboard built with React and D3.js. Features complex data visualization and predictive analytics.
en.home_case_title: Revolutionizing HR with Pagii
en.home_case_desc: We built a comprehensive digital attendance solution that streamlines HR operations with real-time tracking, facial recognition, and detailed analytics.
en.home_cta_desc: Join innovative companies that trust us with their core technology.

id.home_hero_desc: Software house dari Indonesia. Kami siap membantu merancang, membangun, dan mengembangkan aplikasi web serta mobile yang sesuai dengan kebutuhan bisnis modern Anda.
id.home_services_title: Solusi Digital yang Menyeluruh
id.home_services_info_0: Tim developer kami yang berpengalaman siap bergabung ke dalam proyek Anda kapan saja dibutuhkan.
id.home_services_web_desc: Pembuatan aplikasi kustom menggunakan framework modern agar performanya kencang dan mudah dikembangkan.
id.home_services_outsource_desc: Tambahan tenaga engineer berdedikasi untuk bantu mempercepat pengerjaan produk Anda.
id.home_services_vibe_desc: Pembuatan prototipe super cepat dengan bantuan AI untuk wujudkan produk impian Anda.
id.home_services_cloud_desc: Penyiapan infrastruktur cloud dan sistem otomatisasi (CI/CD) agar aplikasi Anda selalu tangguh.
id.home_services_uiux_desc: Desain antarmuka yang cantik, mudah digunakan, dan pastinya bikin pengguna betah.
id.home_services_qa_desc: Proses uji coba menyeluruh agar aplikasi Anda bebas dari bug saat diluncurkan.
id.home_preview_desc: Layanan digital yang lengkap, dirancang khusus untuk bantu percepat pertumbuhan dan bikin operasional Anda makin lancar.
id.home_preview_web_desc: Aplikasi super cepat yang dibangun dengan React, Next.js, Flutter, dan teknologi modern lainnya.
id.home_preview_outsource_desc: Talenta IT pilihan yang siap gabung dan langsung tingkatkan produktivitas tim internal Anda.
id.home_preview_vibe_desc: Bikin prototipe super cepat menggunakan kecerdasan buatan (AI) terdepan untuk langsung wujudkan ide Anda.
id.home_preview_cloud_desc: Pengaturan sistem otomatis dan infrastruktur cloud yang bisa diandalkan, pakai AWS maupun GCP.
id.home_preview_uiux_desc: Tampilan aplikasi yang cantik dan gampang dipakai, hasil dari riset mendalam serta desain yang presisi.
id.home_preview_qa_desc: Uji coba menyeluruh secara manual maupun otomatis, supaya produk Anda benar-benar mulus tanpa bug.
id.home_testimonials_desc: Simak pengalaman nyata dari rekan bisnis yang sudah bekerja sama dengan kami.
id.home_testimonials_quote_1: "HimawariDigi benar-benar ngerubah cara kerja kami. Mereka sangat teliti, cepat tanggap, dan berhasil bikin aplikasi yang jauh melampaui ekspektasi kami."
id.home_testimonials_quote_2: "Layanan Vibe Coding-nya gila banget. Prototipe selesai dalam akhir pekan, dan hasil akhirnya mulus tanpa celah. Bener-bener software house papan atas."
id.home_testimonials_quote_3: "Kami serahkan urusan QA ke HimawariDigi, dan hasilnya bug di production langsung turun drastis. Mereka membaur mulus banget dengan tim internal kami."
id.home_featured_desc: Aplikasi pemantau keuangan real-time yang dibuat pakai React dan D3.js. Lengkap dengan visualisasi data interaktif dan fitur prediksi.
id.home_case_title: Merevolusi HR dengan Pagii
id.home_case_desc: Kami bikin sistem absensi digital lengkap yang bikin urusan HR jadi jauh lebih gampang, dari pelacakan real-time sampai fitur pengenalan wajah.
id.home_cta_title: Sudah siap buat bawa bisnis Anda naik level?
id.home_cta_desc: Ayo bergabung dengan banyak perusahaan inovatif yang sudah mempercayakan teknologinya pada kami.
